meta.title: Did a single Ukrainian pilot shoot down 5 Russian fighters?
meta.description:
As fighting rages in Ukraine following the Russian invasion that commenced Wednesday night, rumors are swirling about a lone Ukrainian MiG-29 fighter pilot shooting down six Russian fighters in a single day, earning the online moniker, “Ghost of Kyiv.” In a super-short-notice edition of AirPower, Alex Hollings dives into the rumors. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews

📱Follow Alex Hollings on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexHollings52
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexhollingswrites
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AlexHollingsWrites

Further Reading: 
Ghost of Kyiv on Sandboxx News: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/are-rumors-of-a-single-ukrainian-fighter-pilot-downing-6-russian-jets-true/

Make sure to check out our coverage of the Russian invasion of Ukraine and more on SandboxxNews.com
